recentArticles.title: Michael Jackson Biopic Cast Looks Shockingly Like The Real People They Play - HuffPost
recentArticles.snippet: # Michael Jackson Biopic Cast Looks Shockingly Like The Real People They Play. ## The highly-anticipated "Michael" film, about the life and early career of Michael Jackson, hits theaters this weekend — and talk about what the film gets right and wrong has already reached a fever pitch. ## MJ is played by his nephew, Jaafar Jackson, and there are moments in the film when it's truly hard to tell them apart. ## With so much buzz circling Michael, let's take a look at some side-by-side comparisons of the actors and the real people they're portraying in the film. ## First up, there's Jaafar Jackson as Michael. Jaafar is the son of Jermaine Jackson, and makes a real splash of a debut in Michael. Universal Pictures | Michael Ochs Archives / Getty Images. From left to right: Rhyan Hill as Tito Jackson, Tre' Horton as Marlon Jackson, Jaafar as Michael, Joseph David-Jones as Jackie Jackson, and Jamal Henderson as Jermaine Jackson.

recentArticles.title: Jenning Leung's homecoming spark shines in tough Macau Black Knights PBA debut - ESPN
recentArticles.snippet: Jenning Leung's homecoming spark shines in tough Macau PBA debut. # Jenning Leung's homecoming spark shines in tough Macau Black Knights PBA debut. The standard for guest teams in the PBA has quietly been raised over the past few seasons. With a 2-8 record through ten games in the PBA Season 50 Commissioner's Cup, Macau has already fallen out of playoff contention, struggling to keep up with the league's physicality, depth, and nightly adjustments. From the first game of the guest team, the 30-year old Leung has established himself as their best local scorer. However, in the two wins of the Black Knights, Leung has served as the main catalyst, erupting for 31 points and five assists on an efficient 11-for-17 shooting from deep -- a clear sign of how much his shot-making dictates Macau's chances of staying competitive. For Leung, playing in the Philippines is not just another professional opportunity -- it is something deeply personal, rooted in his history of growing up in the country and attending school here with Brent International School long before his pro career began.
recentArticles.summary: 此新聞內容與周杰倫無關，主要報導Jenning Leung在澳門黑騎士PBA首秀的表現。

recentArticles.title: 7 Things We Learned From Jay-Z’s ‘New York Times’ Interview - Billboard
recentArticles.snippet: “The first time I wrote a rhyme that I thought I could do it was, ‘I’m the king of hip-hop/ Renewed like Reebok/ The key and the lock with words/ So provocative as long as I live.’ When I caught that pocket, I was like, ‘Oh, I got this,'” Jay recalled about the first time he felt he could master his craft. Jay-Z called Beyoncé an “underrated songwriter,” but he believes she actually prefers producing over writing. “And I never really thought about that, but I’m pretty sure she likes songwriting, but she loves producing.”. Jay-Z also reflected on getting into Dr. Dre’s psyche when penning “Still D.R.E.” for Dr. Dre and Snoop Dogg. He’s like, ‘I’m leaving this place and I want to mature.’ It was just natural to get in his psyche,” Jay said. “I would be thinking, ‘I have to remind people that I’m Dr. Dre.’ That’s where ‘Still D.R.E.’ comes.”.

recentArticles.title: Janet Jackson to Appear at 2026 Grammy Hall of Fame Gala as Her ‘Rhythm Nation 1814’ Is Inducted - Billboard
recentArticles.snippet: Janet Jackson isn’t even mentioned in *Michael*, the hit biopic about her brother Michael Jackson, but she will be front and center at the 2026 Grammy Hall of Fame Gala next week, as her 1989 album, *Janet Jackson’s Rhythm Nation 1814*, is inducted. * Father-daughter duo Fyütch & Aura V, who won a Grammy in February for best children’s music album for *Harmony*, will perform Ella Jenkins’ 1966 children’s classic “You’ll Sing a Song and I’ll Sing a Song.” Aura V set a new record as the youngest individually credited Grammy winner in history. * Taylor Hanson, who achieved fame, a Hot 100-topping single and a Grammy nod for record of the year as a member of the brother trio Hanson, will perform a tribute to Nick Drake’s 1972 album, *Pink Moon.* It was the English musician’s third and final studio album, and the only one of his studio albums to be released in North America during his lifetime.

recentArticles.title: Keke Palmer Really Excited About Hosting Billboard Women in Music 2026 - Billboard
recentArticles.snippet: # Keke Palmer Is Really Excited About Hosting Billboard Women in Music 2026 and Performing New Single’Text Message Unsent’. In addition to hosting, Palmer is hyped to perform on the show, where she will be rolling out her new single, “Text Message Unsent,” which she collaborated on with the director of her upcoming all-star film, *I Love* *Boosters* (May 22), Boots Riley, and his daughter, Alina Kanin. “I get to perform one of the songs — ‘Text Message Unsent’ — which is on the soundtrack EP for the movie,” she said of the mini album from the film starring Palmer, Demi Moore, Naomi Ackie, Don Cheadle, Alexa Demie, Taylour Paige, Poppy Liu and LaKeith Stanfield. When Kimmel asked her to explain the song’s title, Palmer said, “It’s like when you want to say the things to this person that you love but you just know it’s never gonna go anywhere, so it just stays in a text message unsent.”.

The film, starring Jaafar Jackson in his feature debut, debuted to a wave of negative reviews ahead of its theatrical debut, with critics panning it for its "sanitized" storytelling and "style over substance" approach, leading to a low Rotten Tomatoes score. The trailers for *Michael* have attracted plenty of attention online, with the first teaser setting a record with 116.2 million global views in its first 24 hours of release, making it the most-viewed music biopic trailer of all time. Ahead of the film's release, Taj Jackson took to X to express his frustration with the negative press surrounding *Michael*. Despite the film's controversies and negative reviews, *Michael* is projected to be a major box office success, with the film tracking for a massive global opening weekend of roughly $150 million. recentArticles.title: ‘Michael’ moonwalks to $97 million opening, shattering record for music biopics - AP News
recentArticles.snippet: This image released by Lionsgate shows Jaafar Jackson as Michael Jackson in a scene from “Michael.” (Lionsgate via AP). This image released by Lionsgate shows Jaafar Jackson as Michael Jackson in a scene from “Michael.” (Glen Wilson/Lionsgate via AP). This image released by Lionsgate shows Jaafar Jackson as Michael Jackson in a scene from “Michael.” (Lionsgate via AP). This image released by Lionsgate shows Jaafar Jackson as Michael Jackson in a scene from “Michael.” (Lionsgate via AP). NEW YORK (AP) — “Michael,” the big-budget Michael Jackson spectacle, shrugged off bad reviews and a troubled production to launch with $97 million in U.S. and Canada theaters, according to studio estimates Sunday, shattering a record debut for music biopics. The opening for “Michael” added to a strong spring for Hollywood boosted by box-office hits like Amazon MGM’s “Project Hail Mary” and Universal’s “The Super Mario Galaxy Movie.” After three weeks atop the box office, the “Mario” sequel slid to second place, with $21.2 million.

recentArticles.title: Michael Jackson's nephew Jaafar stars as the King of Pop in a new biopic. Here's what to know about him. - Business Insider
recentArticles.snippet: * Michael Jackson's nephew, Jaafar Jackson, is portraying the King of Pop in the new biopic "Michael.". * Jaafar is the son of Michael's brother, Jermaine Jackson, and Alejandra Genevieve Oaziaza. ## Jaafar is the son of Jermaine Jackson and Alejandra Genevieve Oaziaza. Jaafar's father, Jermaine, was one of the original members of the Jackson 5, along with his brothers, Jackie, Tito, Marlon, and Michael. ## Jaafar Jackson makes his acting debut portraying his famous uncle in "Michael.". Jaafar had no formal dance training or acting credits before "Michael," save for one episode of "The Jacksons: Next Generation," a 2015 reality show that followed the lives of his cousins, Taj, Taryll, and TJ (then known as the R&B-pop trio 3T). ## Jaafar Jackson isn't actually singing in "Michael.". When Jaafar landed the lead role in "Michael," he received a vote of confidence from a core member of his family: Michael's mother, Katherine Jackson.

recentArticles.title: Ray J makes outrageous claim he’s slept with over 12,500 women — ‘5 to 10 a day’ while on tour - Page Six
recentArticles.snippet: # Ray J makes outrageous claim he’s slept with over 12,500 women — ‘5 to 10 a day’ while on tour. Ray J made an outrageous claim that he’s slept with 12,500 different women. “We did a celebration, [adult entertainment venue] Booby Trap celebrated my 10,000th,” he claimed. When Newton asked him to clarify if it was “different” partners, Ray J claimed he had slept with “10,000 different people,” before upping the number to 12,500. Newton broke down the math, and said Ray J’s claim would he mean he was averaging sleeping with over one and a half women a day for 30 years. Ray J replied, “Yeah, the math is different ’cause when we’re on tour, we’re thinking five to ten a day.”. “I was celebrating 10,000 bodies.”. Ray J claimed he's slept with 12.500 women during his appearance on Cam Newton's "Funky Friday" podcast. Ray J alleged he slept with five to ten women a day while he was on tour.

Jenner and Chalamet were spotted among a packed celebrity crowd as the Knicks faced the Atlanta Hawks in Game 5 of their first-round Eastern Conference series. Jenner, 28, wore a pair of white studded jeans and a white tank, while Chalamet, 30, opted for an oversized black jacket and a Knicks hat. 微博实时热点. ### #四晚494元房间被退单后变一晚569元#. 【#四晚494元房间被退单后变一晚569元# 当事人：店方谎称老板离世，门店将被查封】#酒店回应低价订五一房间被退单#提前两个月低价预订五一酒店，临近出行却被商家以“老板离世、门店将被查封”等离谱理由要求退房。近日，消费者张女士在社交平台反映，柳州胡同七号酒店无端违约，捏造虚假事由逼迫顾客 ​​​​. ### #茶卡盐湖心形雕塑被吐槽画蛇添足#. 【#茶卡盐湖心形雕塑被吐槽画蛇添足#，景区：此前有游客反馈没打卡点，委托专业人员设计】#茶卡盐湖回应心形雕塑争议#近日，有网友发视频吐槽称，青海海西茶卡盐湖景区中一座心形积木雕塑造型“辣眼睛”，其红绿蓝的配色与周边的自然景观格格不入。在评论区，有不少网友评论表示支持，称在自然景区内摆 ​​​​. ### #广交会点燃入境消费新热潮#. 【#广交会点燃入境消费新热潮#】#广交会让老外爱上中国购# 今天（27日）是第139届广交会二期的最后一天。本届广交会举办以来，超过200个国家和地区的数十万名境外采购商涌入了广东广州，广交会牵起的国际商旅线，让广州的烟火气遇见国际范，也点燃了入境消费的新热潮。广州塔旅游区采购了一批翻译机发 ​​​​. ### 华住会崩了. ### #黄金被扣30年将按正常时效处理#. #黄金被扣30年将按正常时效处理#【警方回应“2859克黄金被扣押30年申请退赔遭拒”：很重视，正按复议程序推进】#黄金被扣30年正按复议程序推进##警方回应男子被扣黄金30年# 近日，“男子30年前被警方扣押2859克黄金申请退赔遭拒”一事引发关注。4月27日，当事人潘永嘉的代理律师张铁雁告诉红星新闻记者 ​​​​.

recentArticles.title: Are my Pokémon and K-pop cards worthless? A pro assessor told me the answer. - Business Insider
recentArticles.snippet: * I have a collection of around 500 Pokémon and K-pop photo cards. I took my cards to Johnathan Lim at Singapore's Oxley Grading, a business that helps collectors assess cards before they decide whether or not to send them in for grading at businesses like PSA and CGC. Lim likened collecting ~~of~~ valuable Pokémon cards to the stock market. "That's like buying a meme stock," Lim said,explainingI'd have to watch the market for anomalous surges and sell the cards at the right time. Of my close to 50 Pokémon cards,Lim said only one or two might get a PSA 9 or 10 when graded. One card of the "Final Fantasy" character Sephiroth — which I was gifted — is in great condition, Lim said, and I can consider grading it to lock in its value. As for the K-pop cards, Lim said I'd likely be at the mercy of market volatility. Based on Lim's pre-grading, it doesn't look likely that I'll secure a $100,000 valuation on my badly-cut Flareon Pokémon card.

recentArticles.title: Max Eberl loves the spectacle of Bayern Munich vs. PSG - Yahoo Sports
recentArticles.snippet: # Max Eberl loves the spectacle of Bayern Munich vs. Bayern Munich board member for sport Max Eberl is just another fan at this point — he is just as excited as the supporters from each club to watch the Bavarians face off with Paris Saint-Germain in the Champions League. It’ll be incredibly exciting to see how this tie unfolds,” said Eberl (as captured by @iMiaSanMia). It will be incredibly exciting to see what happens, because two evenly matched teams, Paris and Bayern, are facing each other.”. Like many fans, Eberl is disappointed that Bayern Munich head coach Vincent Kompany will not be leading the squad vs. “Vincent Kompany is our head coach, and we would have liked to have everyone available. That’s why I’m not worried,” Eberl said. *If you are looking for more Bayern Munich and German national team coverage, check out the latest episodes of Bavarian Podcast Works, which you can get on Acast, Spotify, Apple, or any leading podcast distributor…*.

recentArticles.title: A Guilty Plea in Jam Master Jay’s Murder, Two Decades Later - The New York Times
recentArticles.snippet: # A Guilty Plea in Jam Master Jay’s Murder, Two Decades Later - The New York Times. New York|A Guilty Plea in Jam Master Jay’s Murder, Two Decades Later. # A Guilty Plea in Jam Master Jay’s Murder, Two Decades Later. Jay Bryant’s admission of guilt on Monday was the first time anyone had publicly acknowledged orchestrating the 2002 killing of Jam Master Jay, the D.J. of Run-DMC. A man accused of conspiring to kill Jason Mizell, known as Jam Master Jay, the pioneering D.J. of the rap group Run-DMC, pleaded guilty on Monday to taking part in a murder plot that had baffled investigators for nearly two decades. The admission from Jay Bryant, 52, was the first time anyone had publicly acknowledged orchestrating the killing, which had shaken fans of Run-DMC, the hip-hop group known for its upbeat, sunny hip-hop in the late ’80s and early ’90s, distinct from the gangster rap taking over at the time.
recentArticles.summary: 此新聞報導關於Run-DMC的DJ Jam Master Jay謀殺案的認罪進展，與華語歌手周杰倫無關。

recentArticles.title: Man pleads guilty to murder 2 decades after death of Run DMC's Jam Master Jay - BBC
recentArticles.snippet: # Man pleads guilty to murder 2 decades after death of Run DMC's Jam Master Jay. A man has pleaded guilty to a charge of murder more than 20 years after the fatal ambush shooting of Run-DMC's Jam Master Jay. Jay Bryant, 52, changed his plea on Monday to guilty, telling a judge that he helped others get into a building to ambush and kill Jay Mizell, the pioneering rap star who was known as Jam Master Jay. Prosecutors said that Bryant's DNA was found on a hat inside the recording studio where Mizell was shot in the head in 2002. Prosecutors argued in court that Jordan and Washington planned the "execution" killing out of revenge after being cut out of a drug deal worth nearly $200,000. Prosecutors charged that he opened a back fire door to allow Jordan and Washington entry, and avoid buzzing into the studio so they could ambush Mizell.
recentArticles.summary: 一名男子在Run-DMC成員Jam Master Jay遇害二十年後，承認謀殺罪名，揭露了這起因毒品交易糾紛引發的槍擊案細節。

recentArticles.title: Third man charged in Jam Master Jay murder changes plea to guilty - CBS News
recentArticles.snippet: # Third man charged in Jam Master Jay murder changes plea to guilty. One of the three men charged in the killing of hip-hop icon Jam Master Jay changed his plea to guilty in court on Monday. Jam Master Jay, whose real name was Jason Mizell, was killed in 2002 inside a music studio in Hollis, Queens. Jay Bryant was charged in 2023, three years after Washington and Jordan. He changed his plea to guilty as an accomplice to Mizell's murder, after he originally pleaded not guilty to his earlier indictment. Prosecutors contended that Bryant slipped into the studio building and opened a back fire door so that Washington and Jordan could avoid buzzing up and could ambush the DJ. Prosecutors and trial witnesses said that Jordan shot the DJ while Washington blocked the door during the shooting and ordered one of Mizell's to get on the ground. #### Man charged with killing Run DMC member Jam Master Jay expected to plead guilty.
recentArticles.summary: 關於嘻哈偶像Jam Master Jay的謀殺案，第三名被告已認罪。
